headline: Will lululemon (LULU) Under Heidi O’Neill Prioritize Product Innovation or Digital-First Brand Expansion?
summary: In April 2026, lululemon athletica inc. announced that industry veteran Heidi O’Neill, formerly a senior leader at Nike, will become its Chief Executive Officer and join the Board on September 8, 2026, succeeding the interim co-CEOs who will return to their prior roles. O’Neill’s extensive background in product innovation, digital commerce, and global brand building across performance apparel and footwear positions her to influence how lululemon refines its product mix, deepens customer...
